FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Price holds above MA20 support at 158.17, signaling bullish momentum.
Iran nuclear deal talks progress reduces geopolitical risk, supporting USD strength.
Fed signaling caution keeps yields steady, limiting downside for USD/JPY.
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY trades above MA20 support amid Iran deal optimism and steady Fed outlook, bias remains bullish with key resistance near 160.50.
FX.comment: Price above MA20 with supportive fundamentals favors upside.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 with Mixed Fundamental Signals
tldr_points: Price above MA20 suggests short-term bullish bias
Mixed signals from consumer stocks offset AI sector momentum
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P holds above MA20 with AI momentum offset by consumer weakness; buy with tight risk control
STOCKS.comment: Bullish above MA20 with AI momentum offsetting consumer weakness

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: Price Trades 4.7% Below MA20 as ETF Outflows Accelerate
tldr_points: BTC trades 4.7% below 20-day MA at 75,366, indicating short-term weakness
Spot ETF outflows of $1.26B mark worst week since January, removing key demand catalyst
Strategic reserve bill revision and SEC delays add regulatory headwinds
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC slides below MA20 support as $1.26B ETF outflows and regulatory uncertainty weigh
CRYPTO.comment: Price breakdown below MA20 with $1.26B ETF outflows and diminished policy catalyst
